description: Triads in the United Kingdom are Chinese organized crime groups that first appeared in the post-World War era, with the 14K Triad emerging in Chinese communities in major UK cities as early as 1952. They are involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, extortion, and other criminal activities. The groups expanded following migrations from Hong Kong and Amsterdam in the 1970s and 1980s. They have cooperated with US authorities and shifted from heroin to cannabis and designer drugs.
